entries.source: Data Interpreter
entries.value: Falanqeeyaha Xogta

entries.source: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: Fasiriye Xog qaab waxbarasho AI waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: Paste xog, chart descriptions, ama results iyo baro waxa iyaga mean, waxa iyaga do ma mean, iyo waxa si weydii xiga.

entries.source: Data Interpreter AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Fasiriye Xog qaab waxbarasho AI: hage wax ku ool ah

entries.source: Data Interpreter prompts and study loop
entries.value: Fasiriye Xog Prompts iyo wareeg waxbarasho

entries.source: Dates and summaries matter, but learners often need a way into the human situation: what people believed, what choices they saw, what limits shaped them, and what they could not have known.
entries.value: Dates iyo summaries matter, laakiin ardayda often u baahan way u rogo human situation: waxa dad believed, waxa choices iyaga saw, waxa limits shaped them, iyo waxa iyaga wuu kari lahaa ma hayso la yaqaan.

entries.source: Debate this historical or philosophical claim from both sides. Separate evidence, assumptions, and values.
entries.value: Ka dooda sheegashadan taariikhi ama falsafadeed labada dhinac. Kala saar caddeynta, mala-awaalka, iyo qiyamka.

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI
entries.value: dood leh Personality isticmaalka AI

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: dood leh Personality isticmaalka AI waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: Name dhab ah ama fictional personality iyo dood them ku kasta mawduuc. AI channels their dadweyne style iyo worldview inta keeping dood caddaalad.

entries.value: dood leh Personality isticmaalka AI: hage wax ku ool ah

entries.value: Did aad jawaab ee least hal su'aal ka hor akhris correction?

entries.source: Different jobs need different modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and more.
entries.value: kala duwan jobs u baahan kala duwan qaabab: su'aalo Socratic ah, homework tilmaamo, Flashcards, dood, taariikh jilid door, qoraal critique, iyo badan.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: kala duwan hawlo waxbarasho u baahan kala duwan flows. isticmaal tababaraha shaqo-guriga loogu talagalay tilmaamo, tallaabada xisaabta tababare loogu talagalay problem solving, Socratic macallin loogu talagalay deep understanding, Flashcards loogu talagalay recall, iyo su'aalo loogu talagalay pressure-tested tababar.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: kala duwan hawlo waxbarasho u baahan kala duwan interaction shapes, so inspir isticmaalaa active, qaab-gaar ah teaching. homework tilmaan, Socratic su'aal, taariikhi jilid, flashcard dib-u-eegis, iyo qoraal critique waa gudaha ma behave like isku mid guud chat.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.
entries.value: kala duwan hawlo waxbarasho u baahan kala duwan shapes: su'aalo Socratic ah, homework tilmaamo, Flashcards, dood, taariikh jilid door, qoraal critique, iyo qorshaynta waxbarashada.

entries.source: Different people need different AI learning routes.
entries.value: kala duwan dad u baahan kala duwan AI waxbarasho jidad.

entries.source: Disallowed
entries.value: Lama oggola

entries.source: Disclaimer Of Warranty
entries.value: Afeefka Damaanadda

entries.source: Disclosure of Data
entries.value: Disclosure ee xog

entries.source: Discover paths that fit you
entries.value: Soo hel waddooyin kugu habboon

entries.source: Discover paths that fit you.
entries.value: Discover jidad taas fit aad.

entries.source: Discovery
entries.value: Daahfur

entries.source: Discovery is open where the content is public.
entries.value: Discovery waa fur halkee nuxur waa dadweyne.

entries.source: Dismiss language options
entries.value: Xir xulashooyinka luqadda

entries.source: Distribution that started offline
entries.value: Distribution taas started offline

entries.source: Diverge, cluster, choose, refine, and make the idea actionable.
entries.value: Diverge, cluster, dooro, refine, iyo samee fikrad actionable.

entries.source: DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims
entries.value: DMCA ogeysiis iyo Procedure loogu talagalay Copyright Infringement sheegashooyin

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: Do I know waxa si tababar xiga?

entries.source: Do not accept a revised paragraph until you can explain why the revision is better.
entries.value: Ha aqbalin cutub la hagaajiyay ilaa aad sharxi karto sababta hagaajintu uga fiican tahay.

entries.source: Do not act like a passive Q&A tutor or bury work in chat. Do not overpraise weak output. Keep the user as decision owner, preserve their voice in writing tasks, and end sessions with a concrete artifact or next action.
entries.value: Do ma act like passive Q& macallin ama bury work gudaha chat. Do ma overpraise daciif output. Keep user as decision owner, preserve their voice gudaha qoraal tasks, iyo end sessions leh concrete artifact ama xiga action.

entries.source: Do not advance just because the learner clicked next. Require evidence, name misconceptions specifically, and repair weak links before moving on.
entries.value: Do ma advance just sababtoo ah arday clicked xiga. Require caddeyn, name faham-qaldanno specifically, iyo repair daciif xiriiriyo ka hor moving ku.

entries.source: Do not amplify hateful or dangerous arguments. Reframe sensitive topics around evidence, ethics, and learning.
entries.value: Do ma amplify hateful ama dangerous doodo. Reframe sensitive mawduucyo ku wareegsan caddeyn, anshax, iyo waxbarasho.

entries.source: Do not ask for a complete summary before you know the prerequisite ideas.
entries.value: Ha codsan soo-koobid dhammaystiran ka hor intaadan garan fikradaha hordhaca ah.

entries.source: Do not ask learners to run unsafe code. Explain security-sensitive code at a high level when needed.
entries.value: Do ma weydii ardayda si run unsafe code. sharax amniga-sensitive code ee high heer marka needed.

entries.source: Do not ask which product wins. Ask which learning behavior fits.
entries.value: Do ma weydii kee badeecad wins. weydii kee waxbarasho behavior fits.

entries.source: Do not claim live verification without tools. Recommend checking primary sources for current facts.
entries.value: Do ma sheegasho live verification la'aan tools. Recommend checking primary ilo loogu talagalay hadda jira facts.

entries.source: Do not complete graded work for the learner. Make them own the final response.
entries.value: Do ma complete graded work loogu talagalay arday. samee them u gaar ah kama dambays response.

entries.source: Do not confuse a fast answer with mastery.
entries.value: Do ma confuse fast jawaab leh mastery.

entries.source: Do not debate only the side you already agree with.
entries.value: Ha doodin oo keliya dhinaca aad hore ugu raacsan tahay.

entries.source: Do not ignore hesitation; uncertainty is a useful signal for review.
entries.value: Ha iska indho tirin hakadka; hubanti la’aantu waa calaamad waxtar u leh dib-u-eegista.

entries.source: Do not invent bibliographic details. Mark unknown fields clearly.
entries.value: Do ma invent bibliographic details. Mark unknown fields clearly.

entries.source: Do not invent citations. Clearly mark when source verification is needed.
entries.value: Do ma invent citations. Clearly mark marka il verification waa needed.

entries.source: Do not lecture by default, ask multiple questions, hide progress, or dump the answer too soon. Use hint ladders before explanations. If the learner asks for direct explanation, give it concisely and then require a final synthesis in their own words. For medical, legal, financial, or sensitive decisions, include appropriate caution and avoid pushing a hidden conclusion.
entries.value: Do ma lecture by default, weydii multiple su'aalo, hide progress, ama dump jawaab too soon. isticmaal tilmaan ladders ka hor explanations. haddii arday weydiiyaa loogu talagalay toos ah sharaxaad, sii taas concisely iyo kadib require kama dambays synthesis gudaha their u gaar ah erayo. loogu talagalay medical, legal, financial, ama sensitive decisions, ku dar appropriate caution iyo iska ilaali pushing hidden conclusion.

entries.source: Do not let roleplay replace dates, context, documents, or evidence labels.
entries.value: Ha u oggolaan roleplay inuu beddelo taariikho, macne guud, dukumentiyo, ama calaamadaha caddeynta.

entries.source: Do not make a plan that assumes every topic needs equal time.
entries.value: Ha samayn qorshe u qaadanaya in mawduuc kasta u baahan yahay waqti isku mid ah.

entries.source: Do not make flashcards from sentences you still cannot explain in your own words.
entries.value: Ha ka samayn flashcards jumlado aadan weli ku sharxi karin erayadaada.

entries.source: Do not paste an assignment and ask for the finished response.
entries.value: Ha gelin hawl oo ha codsan jawaabta dhammaatay.

entries.source: Do not provide long copyrighted text. Work from user-provided excerpts or brief summaries.
entries.value: Do ma provide long copyrighted text. Work ka yimid user-provided excerpts ama brief summaries.

entries.source: Do not provide therapy or crisis counseling. Encourage trusted human support for serious distress.
entries.value: Do ma provide therapy ama crisis counseling. Encourage trusted human support loogu talagalay serious distress.

entries.source: Do not reproduce long copyrighted passages. Summarize user-provided text.
entries.value: Do ma reproduce long copyrighted passages. soo koob user-provided text.

entries.source: Do not reread notes before testing what you can already recall.
entries.value: Ha dib u akhrin qoraallada ka hor intaadan tijaabin waxa aad hore u xasuusan karto.

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: Do ma dib-u-eegis everything equally

entries.source: Do not shame mistakes. For graded work, coach understanding rather than producing a submission.
entries.value: Do ma shame qaladaad. loogu talagalay graded work, tababare understanding rather ka badan producing submission.

entries.source: Do not skip showing what you already tried; the useful help depends on that context.
entries.value: Ha ka boodin muujinta waxa aad hore u isku dayday; caawinta waxtarka leh waxay ku xiran tahay macnahaas.

entries.source: Do not stop after the first explanation; make yourself answer questions about it.
entries.value: Ha joogsan sharaxaadda koowaad ka dib; naftaada ku khasab inaad ka jawaabto su’aalo ku saabsan.

entries.source: Do not treat generated dialogue as a real quote or primary source.
entries.value: Ha ula dhaqmin wada-hadal la soo saaray sida xigasho dhab ah ama ilo aasaasi ah.

entries.source: Do something with it
entries.value: Wax ku samee

entries.source: Do the comparison pages include private user chats?
entries.value: Do isbarbardhig pages ku dar gaar ah user chats?

entries.source: Do these guides connect to live AI learning tools?
entries.value: Do kuwan hagayaal isku xir si live AI waxbarasho tools?

entries.source: Do we have free will?
entries.value: Ma leenahay xorriyad doorasho?

entries.source: Do you have a next route open: a mode, subject hub, workflow, or related guide?
entries.value: Do aad hayso xiga jid fur: qaab, maaddo hub, hab-socod, ama la xiriira hage?

entries.source: Do you know which route to use next: a mode, prompt, subject hub, or related guide?
entries.value: Do aad know kee jid si isticmaal xiga: qaab, prompt, maaddo hub, ama la xiriira hage?

entries.source: Does inspir expose private homework chats to Google?
entries.value: Does inspir expose gaar ah homework chats si Google?

entries.source: Does inspir publish a child's private chats?
entries.value: Does inspir publish child's gaar ah chats?

entries.source: Does inspir support schools?
entries.value: inspir ma taageeraa dugsiyada?

entries.source: Does this comparison include private user chats?
entries.value: Does tan isbarbardhig ku dar gaar ah user chats?

entries.source: Draft cards, test the learner, refine weak cards, and suggest review spacing.
entries.value: qoraal qabyo ah cards, tijaabi arday, refine daciif cards, iyo suggest dib-u-eegis spacing.

entries.source: Draw a supply-demand graph
entries.value: Sawir garaafka sahayda iyo baahida

entries.source: Draw/Sketch Board
entries.value: Guddiga Sawiridda/Qorshaynta

entries.source: due date
entries.value: taariikhda kama dambaysta ah

entries.source: Each article is written to help learners, parents, educators, and builders use AI for understanding, practice, and confidence.
entries.value: kasta maqaal waa written si caawin ardayda, waalidiinta, educators, iyo builders isticmaal AI loogu talagalay understanding, tababar, iyo kalsooni.

entries.source: Each audience path connects to public, crawlable learning surfaces.
entries.value: kasta dhagaystayaal jid connects si dadweyne, la gurguuran karo waxbarasho surfaces.

entries.source: Each category has its own search intent, live mode links, and guide structure so the library is useful to people and legible to search systems.
entries.value: kasta category leh its u gaar ah raadi intent, qaabka tooska ah xiriiriyo, iyo hage structure so maktabad waa waxtar leh si dad iyo legible si raadi systems.

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: kasta isbarbardhig waa written si noqo caddaalad, waxtar leh, iyo action-oriented: waxa la yaqaan tool waa good loogu talagalay, halkee inspir waa kala duwan, iyo kee dadweyne qaab si fur koowaad.

entries.source: Each guide ends with practice plans, routes, and links into the exact learning mode that fits.
entries.value: Hage kasta wuxuu ku dhammaadaa qorshayaal tababar, jiddo, iyo xiriiriyeyaal u gala habka waxbarasho ee saxda ah.

entries.source: Each hub is a crawlable subject guide, but it also sends learners straight into live guest-mode learning instead of stranding them on a brochure page.
entries.value: kasta hub waa la gurguuran karo maaddo hage, laakiin taas also sends ardayda straight u rogo live guest-qaab waxbarasho halkii ee stranding them ku brochure bog.

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public URL so learners can arrive from search directly inside the right learning experience.
entries.value: kasta qaab waxbarasho leh dadweyne URL so ardayda wuu karaa arrive ka yimid raadi si toos ah gudaha right waxbarasho experience.

entries.source: Each map card connects a real learner need to live modes, prompt starters, deeper guides, and a review loop. People can use it. Crawlers can understand it.
entries.value: kasta khariidad card connects dhab ah arday u baahan si qaababka tooska ah, bilowyo prompt, deeper hagayaal, iyo wareeg dib-u-eegis. dad wuu karaa isticmaal taas. Crawlers wuu karaa understand taas.

entries.source: Each mode opens as a public guest chat with its own purpose, examples, and learning flow, so learners can start with the right kind of support immediately.
entries.value: Hab kasta wuxuu u furmaa chat marti dadweyne oo leh ujeeddo, tusaalooyin, iyo socod waxbarasho u gaar ah, si ardaydu isla markiiba ugu bilaabaan taageerada ku habboon.

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: kasta bog xiriiriyo isbarbardhig intent si qaababka tooska ah, hagayaal, Prompts, iyo AI-readable discovery files.

entries.source: Each path connects the right public guest modes, prompts, and guides so learners can move from a search intent into a real practice loop.
entries.value: kasta jid connects right dadweyne qaababka martida, Prompts, iyo hagayaal so ardayda wuu karaa move ka yimid raadi intent u rogo dhab ah wareeg tababar.

entries.source: Each phrase maps to the same practical workflow: choose a public mode, ask for active help, then review what changed.
entries.value: kasta phrase khariidado si isku mid wax ku ool ah hab-socod: dooro dadweyne qaab, weydii loogu talagalay active caawin, kadib dib-u-eegis waxa changed.

entries.source: Each prompt opens the matching public mode, so a learner can move from search result to a focused study session quickly.
entries.value: kasta prompt furaa matching dadweyne qaab, so arday wuu karaa move ka yimid raadi result si diiradda saaran study session si degdeg ah.

entries.source: Each public mode has a different learning behavior, so every guide gives learners and search systems a clear explanation of when to use that mode, what to ask, and how to keep learning active.
entries.value: kasta dadweyne qaab leh kala duwan waxbarasho behavior, so kasta hage siiyaa ardayda iyo raadi systems sharaxaad cad ee marka si isticmaal taas qaab, waxa si weydii, iyo sida si keep waxbarasho active.

entries.source: Each route ends with explain-back, a quiz, a flashcard, a source check, or a study plan.
entries.value: kasta jid ends leh sharax-back, su'aal, flashcard, il hubi, ama qorshe waxbarasho.

entries.source: Each step opens a live guest mode, so this is not a static guide. It is a route into practice, feedback, and review.
entries.value: kasta step furaa live qaabka martida, so tan waa ma static hage. taas waa jid u rogo tababar, jawaab-celin, iyo dib-u-eegis.

entries.source: Each subject hub names the learning job, recommends the right focused modes, and shows how to finish with evidence of understanding instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: kasta maaddo hub names hawl waxbarasho, recommends right diiradda saaran qaabab, iyo shows sida si finish leh caddeyn ee understanding halkii ee passive jawaab-koobiyeyn.

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: Easy. Push taas later.

entries.source: economics simulator AI
entries.value: economics jile AI

entries.source: Economics Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Play with markets, scarcity, incentives, policy, and personal finance through simple simulations.
entries.value: Jilaha Dhaqaalaha qaab waxbarasho AI waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: Play leh markets, scarcity, incentives, siyaasad, iyo shakhsi ah finance iyada oo loo marayo fudud simulations.

entries.source: Economics Simulator AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Jilaha Dhaqaalaha qaab waxbarasho AI: hage wax ku ool ah

entries.value: Jilaha Dhaqaalaha Prompts iyo wareeg waxbarasho

entries.value: tignoolajiyada waxbarashada

entries.value: Codsi Waxbarasho

entries.value: Dhagaystayaasha Waxbarasho

entries.source: EducationalOrganization
entries.value: Urur Waxbarasho

entries.value: Saamaynta mashiinka daabacaadda

entries.source: End by writing the strongest claim and strongest counterclaim.
entries.value: End by qoraal strongest sheegasho iyo strongest counterclaim.

entries.source: End with a recap from memory.
entries.value: End leh recap ka yimid xusuus.

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas
entries.value: Dhibaatooyinka Anshaxa

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Work through dilemmas by weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, rights, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: Murannada Anshaxa qaab waxbarasho AI waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: Work iyada oo loo marayo dilemmas by weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, xuquuq, iyo tradeoffs.

entries.source: Ethics Dilemmas AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Murannada Anshaxa qaab waxbarasho AI: hage wax ku ool ah

entries.source: Evaluate a mode before using it with learners

entries.source: Evaluate a public AI learning layer first, then explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, content alignment, and usage funding.
entries.value: Evaluate dadweyne AI waxbarasho layer koowaad, kadib sahmi custom hab-socodyo, confidentiality u baahan, nuxur alignment, iyo usage funding.

entries.source: Evaluate articles, claims, videos, or posts for evidence, bias, reliability, and missing context.

entries.source: Evaluate evidence, author, motive, corroboration, and missing perspectives.

entries.source: Every article connects to categories, live modes, subject hubs, learning paths, and related guides.
entries.value: Maqaal kasta wuxuu ku xirmaa qaybo, habab nool, xarumo maaddo, jiddo waxbarasho, iyo hagayaal la xiriira.

entries.source: Every article in this topic cluster.
entries.value: kasta maqaal gudaha tan mawduuc cluster.

entries.source: Every core learning mode has a public guest entrypoint so people can start from search, social, or a shared link.
entries.value: kasta core qaab waxbarasho leh dadweyne guest entrypoint so dad wuu karaa bilow ka yimid raadi, social, ama shared xiriiriye.

entries.source: Every guide, path, subject hub, and prompt route is connected so learners and AI systems can understand the map.
entries.value: Hage kasta, jid kasta, xarun maaddo kasta, iyo jid prompt kasta way isku xiran yihiin si ardayda iyo nidaamyada AI ay u fahmaan khariidadda.

entries.source: Every indexable guest learning chat, organized by teaching behavior and learning need.
entries.value: kasta la tusi karo raadinta guest waxbarasho chat, organized by teaching behavior iyo waxbarasho u baahan.

entries.source: Every link here is public and crawlable. Private user chats stay out of comparison, sitemap, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: kasta xiriiriye here waa dadweyne iyo la gurguuran karo. gaar ah user chats stay out ee isbarbardhig, sitemap, iyo AI-readable discovery files.

entries.source: Every non-app page now has a job: build trust, explain the learning route, and send learners toward a useful next action without hiding the important details.
entries.value: Bog kasta oo aan app ahayn hadda shaqo ayuu leeyahay: dhis kalsooni, sharax jidka waxbarashada, oo ardayda u dir tallaabo xigta oo waxtar leh adigoon qarin faahfaahinta muhiimka ah.

entries.source: Every public inspir mode has its own guest URL, examples, and teaching behavior, so learners can arrive directly from search and begin in the right flow.
entries.value: kasta dadweyne inspir qaab leh its u gaar ah guest URL, tusaalooyin, iyo teaching behavior, so ardayda wuu karaa arrive si toos ah ka yimid raadi iyo begin gudaha right flow.

entries.source: Every public learning mode has guides and prompt loops.
entries.value: kasta dadweyne qaab waxbarasho leh hagayaal iyo prompt wareegyo.

entries.source: Every public mode is a doorway into a different learning behavior, so the format can match the job instead of forcing every learner into one generic chat box.
entries.value: kasta dadweyne qaab waa doorway u rogo kala duwan waxbarasho behavior, so qaab wuu karaa match job halkii ee forcing kasta arday u rogo hal guud chat box.

entries.source: Every subject page connects content to action.
entries.value: kasta maaddo bog connects nuxur si action.

entries.source: Every workflow below is hand-linked to public pages: a path when one exists, the best live modes, prompt starters, related guides, and a review rhythm.

entries.source: EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY LAW, YOU WILL HOLD US AND OUR OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS HARMLESS FOR ANY INDIRECT, PUNITIVE, SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGE, HOWEVER IT ARISES (INCLUDING ATTORNEYS’ FEES AND ALL RELATED COSTS AND EXPENSES OF LITIGATION AND ARBITRATION, OR AT TRIAL OR ON APPEAL, IF ANY, WHETHER OR NOT LITIGATION OR ARBITRATION IS INSTITUTED), WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT, NEGLIGENCE, OR OTHER TORTIOUS ACTION, OR ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THIS AGREEMENT, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION ANY CLAIM FOR PERSONAL INJURY OR PROPERTY DAMAGE, ARISING FROM THIS AGREEMENT AND ANY VIOLATION BY YOU OF ANY FEDERAL, STATE, OR LOCAL LAWS, STATUTES, RULES, OR REGULATIONS, EVEN IF COMPANY HAS BEEN PREVIOUSLY ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGE. EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY LAW, IF THERE IS LIABILITY FOUND ON THE PART OF COMPANY, IT WILL BE LIMITED TO THE AMOUNT PAID FOR THE PRODUCTS AND/OR SERVICES, AND UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES WILL THERE BE CONSEQUENTIAL OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. SOME STATES DO NOT ALLOW THE EXCLUSION OR LIMITATION OF PUNITIVE, INCIDENTAL OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, SO THE PRIOR LIMITATION OR EXCLUSION MAY NOT APPLY TO YOU.
entries.value: EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY sharci, aad wuu HOLD US iyo keenna OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, iyo AGENTS HARMLESS loogu talagalay kasta INDIRECT, PUNITIVE, SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL, ama CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGE, HOWEVER taas ARISES (INCLUDING ATTORNEYS’ khidmadaha iyo dhammaan la xiriira COSTS iyo EXPENSES ee LITIGATION iyo ARBITRATION, ama ee TRIAL ama ku APPEAL, haddii kasta, WHETHER ama ma LITIGATION ama ARBITRATION waa INSTITUTED), WHETHER gudaha ACTION ee CONTRACT, NEGLIGENCE, ama OTHER TORTIOUS ACTION, ama ARISING OUT ee ama gudaha CONNECTION leh tan AGREEMENT, INCLUDING la'aan LIMITATION kasta sheegasho loogu talagalay shakhsi ah INJURY ama PROPERTY DAMAGE, ARISING ka yimid tan AGREEMENT iyo kasta VIOLATION BY aad ee kasta FEDERAL, STATE, ama LOCAL LAWS, STATUTES, xeerarka, ama REGULATIONS, EVEN haddii shirkad leh BEEN PREVIOUSLY ADVISED ee POSSIBILITY ee SUCH DAMAGE. EXCEPT AS PROHIBITED BY sharci, haddii THERE waa LIABILITY FOUND ku PART ee shirkad, taas wuu noqo LIMITED si AMOUNT PAID loogu talagalay PRODUCTS iyo/ama adeegyo, iyo UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES wuu THERE noqo CONSEQUENTIAL ama PUNITIVE DAMAGES. SOME STATES DO ma ALLOW EXCLUSION ama LIMITATION ee PUNITIVE, INCIDENTAL ama CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, SO PRIOR LIMITATION ama EXCLUSION waxaa laga yaabaa ma APPLY si aad.

entries.source: Explain My Answer

entries.source: Explain My Answer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Sharax Jawaabtayda qaab waxbarasho AI waa qaab diiradda saaran oo AI loogu isticmaalo waxbarasho halkii si dadban jawaabo loo ururin lahaa. Qaabkan waxaa loo dhisay hawl gaar ah: Paste su'aal, kaaga jawaab, iyo expected jawaab haddii aad hayso taas. kaaga saaxiib sharaxaa reasoning iyo caawisaa aad iska ilaali isku mid qalad xiga waqti.
